Tangram Medtech QMS

My Activity 

This is the QMS section of Formwork in which you can manage Documents, Records and, based on your subscription, CAPAs and Trainings. Click on an entry on the left side to get started.

Things that are sent to you for review, or sent by you for review appear here. Currently, there's nothing you need to review :)

Formwork Changelog

1.104.0

Released April 6th, 2026

Formwork can now be used as an MCP server 🎉. A guide/tutorial on how to connect to Formwork MCP will be published to The Formwork Manual soon.

1.103.5

Released April 1st, 2026

QMS ZIP Import improvements: real-time show page, showing you rich details about the import.

1.103.5

Released March 26th, 2026

Big fix: incorrect document creator was shown when an initial draft was discarded, and a new draft was created by a different user. Now fixed.

1.103.4

Released March 23rd, 2026

Fix errors during indexing by the AI Assistant, for more robust operation.

1.103.3

Released March 17th, 2026

AI Assistant enhancements

1.103.2

Released March 17th, 2026

Fix: adding, resolving, or deleting comments used to mess up the scroll position. 

1.103.1

Released March 13th, 2026

Minor dependency upgrades
Added Failure Modes to FMEA audit export

1.103

Released March 12th, 2026

Formwork now has a read-only AI Assistant that has knowledge of your entire QMS. Use it to ask questions about your documents, records, CAPAs, trainings, risk management, and more 🎉.

Must be enabled by an admin to start using.

Write capabilities coming soon to the Assistant.

1.102.3

Released March 11th, 2026

PDF Settings will now be copied over when new document versions or product release versions are created.

1.102.2

Released March 11th, 2026

Product creation UI improvements:
Fix the "true" toast showing on product creation
Make the pre-populate records field expanded by default
Bug fix: Magic DiCOM product's test runs could not be opened.



1.102.1

Released March 11th, 2026

"Switch Company" dropdown entry moved to be on the company name instead of the user avatar
Minor wording improvement for copying over OpenRegulatory Templates
Fix product deletion when batch export is associated with a product release; message toast on deleting product
Make alphabetically sorting robust to handle leading whitespaces

1.102.0

Released February 26th, 2026

You can now associate tasks with anything! This will help you assign stuff to people, add reminders and create small discussions for every thing you're working on. Just go to an item (be it a CAPA, a User Need or a Change Request) and click on "Create Task" in the dots menu / More actions menu.

All pending tasks will be shown in the dashboard.

We also took the chance to update the views of Product items so you can see the associated tasks on the right side.

1.101.1

Released February 25th, 2026

CAPAs can now be released with a review.
Design Outputs can be linked to multiple records.
Exclude future items from Requirements and Risk Overview.
Hide associations of future items in Audit Exports.

1.101.0

Released February 23rd, 2026

The steps and expected fields are now rich text fields. This will allow you to add proper lists (1. first step, 2. second step) on your test descriptions.

We also allow now to attach images (or any file) to descriptions.

1.100.4

Released February 20th, 2026

ZIP Import upgrades:
increase file size limit to 1.5GB
make the imports idempotent (so re-uploading the same zip by mistake is safe)
Add support for video (mp4, mov, wmv) and additional file types (dotx, pptm, xml, mht, msg, psd, ai, eps, indd)
Also:
Remove Regulatory Updates from navigation bar.
Show assigned users in Roadmap tasks.

1.100.3

Released February 16th, 2026

Truncate file paths when exporting to prevent Windows limit of 260 characters per file path.
Custom Document Types in QMS Overview entries.
Fix bug: copied batch reviews kept pointing to the original product after making a copy.
Fix bug: attachments to training requests were not being uploaded.

1.100.2

Released February 10th, 2026

Prevent editor data loss when 2FA (or any other issue) interrupts save
Better redirect for 2FA: it will redirect to where you were before
Show titles of associated items on audit exports.
Add lower/upper bounds when selecting minimum quiz score.
Fix bug: companies with LLM tasks could not be deleted.

1.100.1

Released February 4th, 2026

Move Google Docs out of beta
Append the release and activity information in the PDF of the Google Doc itself
Mention the Google Docs feature in the "File already open" warning
Only show the permissions troubleshoot box after the Google Doc file is created
In document/record, open links in a new tab
Allow selecting a particular product release for the Batch Export in Products. This will speed up the Batch Export, while filtering out noise if needed.



1.100.0

Released February 2nd, 2026

New Design Outputs module available for all products. To activate it, go to your product -> edit -> enable design outputs. You can link design outputs to design inputs, system tests and records.

1.99.2

Released February 2nd, 2026

When creating a new Product, provide an option to include th
